title: Iran war to supercharge Asia's move from fossil fuels to electrons
description: The U.S. and Israeli conflict with Iran is accelerating Asia's shift to electrification, particularly electric vehicles and battery storage. This pivot is driven by the potential loss of oil and LNG supplies, with significant growth anticipated in two- and three-wheeler EVs and battery systems across Southeast and South Asia.

title: Antarctic fish fossil reveals a key stage before animals moved onto land
description: A rare Antarctic fossil reveals how early fish lived and hunted just before animals began moving onto land 380 million years ago.
